title: habenaria travancorica
intro: Habenaria travancorica, also known as the Travancore Habenaria, is a rare and endangered orchid species native to the Western Ghats region of India. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Habenaria travancorica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and aid in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared into herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and powder, which can be administered orally or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
